text:
Chameleon Cat (カメレオンキャット, Kamereon Kyatto) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game. This cat is able to shape-shift into any other animal.
__NOTOC__

Summary

Chameleon Cat カメレオンキャット - This card when activated, allows the user to bring forth a Chameleon Cat. This endangered species once tamed, can freely transform into any animal. It does however, retain its original size and mass. This means that if it were to transform into an elephant, it would still be the same size (and weight) of the original cat.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.035 :: カメレオンキャット 
絶滅寸前の珍獣。飼いならせば様々な動物に変身してくれる。ただし体積を変化させることは出来ないので、小さな象や大きなハムスターになってしまうが・・・。
|-
![Eng]
|No.035 :: Chameleon Cat 
A rare, endangered animal. It can turn into various animals once tamed. However, since it is not able to alter its volume, it stays the same size, so it will be a small elephant or a big hamster.
|}
